user.title: Nanit Sound & Light
user.description: Pick which Nanit account to use. The main Nanit integration handles authentication for this addon.

speaker.title: Select Sound & Light Machine
speaker.description: Choose which paired Sound & Light Machine to control.

speaker_ip.title: Speaker IP
speaker_ip.description: Enter the local IP of your Sound & Light Machine (reserve it in your router's DHCP settings). Leave blank to use the cloud relay — the integration still works, but temperature and humidity sensors will be unavailable until a local IP is configured.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Sound & Light
reauth_confirm.description: This integration relies on the main {main_integration_name} integration for authentication. Open that integration and re-authenticate it, then click Submit here to retry.

error.no_speakers: No Sound & Light Machine is paired with the selected Nanit account.
error.discovery_failed: Failed to discover speakers. Check that the Nanit integration is authenticated.
error.nanit_still_broken: Still unable to read a valid access token from the main Nanit integration. Re-authenticate it, then try again.

abort.nanit_not_installed: The Nanit integration is not installed or not configured. Install it first, then retry.
abort.nanit_needs_reauth: The main Nanit integration's credentials are no longer valid. Open it, re-authenticate, then retry adding Sound & Light.
abort.already_configured: This Sound & Light Machine is already configured.
abort.no_speakers_on_account: No Sound & Light Machine is paired with this Nanit account.
abort.speaker_selection_failed: Could not find the selected speaker — the list may have changed. Start setup again.
abort.reauth_missing_entry: Cannot reauthenticate — the Sound & Light config entry is missing or incomplete. Remove and re-add the integration.

init.title: Nanit Sound & Light options
init.description: Edit the speaker IP. Leave blank to fall back to cloud relay — temperature and humidity sensors will be unavailable in that mode.

nanit_entry_missing.title: Nanit integration is missing
nanit_entry_missing.description: The main Nanit integration that Sound & Light depends on has been removed. Install and configure it, then reload this integration.

extended_disconnect.title: Sound & Light Machine is unreachable
extended_disconnect.description: The speaker has been disconnected for more than {minutes} minutes. Home Assistant is still retrying in the background, but if this persists check that the speaker is powered on, connected to Wi-Fi, and reachable at the configured LAN IP. Open Settings → Devices & Services → Nanit Sound & Light → Configure to edit the IP or switch to cloud-relay mode.
